message.content:
Remove unused code from redux sagas based on this list. For each file, read it first, then remove ONLY the unused items listed.

## src/redux/sagas/blockCard.ts
- Line 50: Remove unused `blockCardClear`

## src/redux/sagas/dacc/daccSituation.ts
- Line 11: Remove unused `SituationRaceResponse`

## src/redux/sagas/duplicateCard.ts
- Line 73: Remove unused `duplicateCardClear`

## src/redux/sagas/exemptionEligibility/getExemptionEligibility.ts
- Line 2: Remove unused `delay` import

## src/redux/sagas/invoices/Models/invoice.ts
- Lines 41-53: Remove unused parameters: allCards, account, cards, lastFourAccountNumber, date
- Lines 56-57: Remove unused Compras, onlyCardNumbers
- Line 63: Remove unused `data`

## src/redux/sagas/invoices/details.ts
- Line 30: Remove unused `data`

## src/redux/sagas/invoices/functions.ts
- Line 387: Remove unused `index`
- Line 413: Remove unused `transactions`

## src/redux/sagas/logout.ts
- Line 47: Remove unused `logout`

## src/redux/sagas/points/products.ts
- Line 1: Remove unused `select` import

## src/redux/sagas/rescue/index.ts
- Lines 14-15: Remove unused `status` parameters

## src/redux/sagas/unlockCard/unlockCardRequest.ts
- Line 2: Remove unused `putResolve` import
- Line 5: Remove unused `cardsActions`

## src/redux/sagas/validateCardPassword.ts
- Line 19: Remove unused `response`

## src/redux/store/createReducer.ts
- Lines 6: Remove unused `state`, `action`

After making all changes, confirm what was removed.
